question: What is the relative position of the man to the carriage in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The man is in front of the carriage. (B) The man is behind the carriage. (C) The man is inside the carriage. (D) The man is on top of the carriage.
gold_answer: The man is inside the carriage
answer_choices: The man is in front of the carriage
The man is behind the carriage
The man is inside the carriage
The man is on top of the carriage

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A man standing behind the carriage, holding the reins, with horses in front.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The man is in front of the carriage, driving it with horses pulling it forward.

inpaint_prompt_used: A man standing behind the carriage, holding the reins, with horses in front.
negative_prompt_used: The man is in front of the carriage, driving it with horses pulling it forward.
